text: Which of the following are regular security measures implemented at security level 1?

options.text: Supervise the handling of cargo and ship stores
Evacuate non-essential personnel to a Citadel

explanation: At Security Level 1, routine measures include supervising cargo and ship stores handling to prevent unauthorized access or introduction of contraband. Suspending operations, 100% manual package search, or evacuating personnel are elevated measures typically for Security Level 2 or 3.
